summary: Tested Ownology SMS Outreach / CRM feature end-to-end. Backend: 11/11 pytest cases pass on /api/trpc/outreach.* — list returns 31 contacts each with a status field, setStatus persists for valid enum values (warm/lukewarm/cold/sales/skip) and is rejected with HTTP 400 for invalid values, bySlug returns only public fields (firstName/winery/event, no mobileAu leak) and null for unknown slugs, markViewed sets first_viewed_at once and increments view_count on every call (verified across two calls separated by 1.1s), create defaults status to 'cold' and accepts an explicit status, and markSmsSent/markBooked/remove still work (regression). Frontend: /admin/contacts renders 31 rows, KPI shows 31, filter chip bar [data-testid=status-filter-bar] shows All(31)/Warm(1)/Lukewarm(0)/Cold(28)/Sales-Vendor(2)/Skip(0) summing to 31, Sales chip filters to exactly matt-manly-spirits + guillermo-archie-rose-spirits, All restores 31, status-select-<slug> dropdown change calls outreach.setStatus and counts update live (cold→warm bumped Warm 1→2 and Cold 28→27, restore bumped back). Sales rows are dimmed and show 'SMS draft hidden' text with no copy-sms button. /hi/nathan-brokenwood-wines shows "G'day Nathan." + 'We crossed paths at VIVID Event' and contains no 'Great chatting' phrasing. /hi/jane-tyrrells has no painPoint so [data-testid=hi-intro] is present with the honest fallback 'We didn't get long to chat — I've since shipped...'. /hi/zzzunknown-slug-fake correctly renders [data-testid=hi-notfound]. Regression: /admin hub shows 'Personal SMS Contacts' card linking to /admin/contacts, and /admin/funnel, /, /free-run, /the-press, /dashboard, /cellar-journal all return 200 with content. No new errors introduced.

issues: Pre-existing React hydration warning: nested <a> inside <a> in the header back-link area (flagged in iteration_11; still present, not introduced by this work). Not blocking.

On the not-found path the page still fires outreach.markViewed → server returns a 400 in the network tab (visible as a 'Failed to load resource: 400' console error). Cosmetic only — the [data-testid=hi-notfound] state still renders correctly. Consider gating markViewed behind `if (contact)` in HiContact.tsx so we don't dirty server logs for typo URLs.

action_items: (Optional, cosmetic) In /app/client/src/pages/HiContact.tsx, only call markViewed.mutate when `contact` is non-null — avoids 400s in server logs / browser console when someone hits /hi/<typo>.
(Carried from iteration_11) Fix nested <a> in /admin header back-link to silence React hydration warning.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/server/routers/outreach.ts:54-67 — markViewed has no existence check. If the slug doesn't exist the UPDATE simply affects 0 rows and the endpoint still returns {ok:true}; that's fine, but the upstream /hi/:slug page fires markViewed even when bySlug resolved to null (HiContact.tsx:28-35 uses a ref gate but no `if (contact)` guard). Net effect is a wasted DB round-trip + console noise. Recommend: gate the useEffect on `contact?.slug` instead of `slug`.

/app/server/routers/outreach.ts:78-120 — `create` mutation: if `input.slug` is provided AND already exists the DB throws a unique-violation and we surface a friendly error, good. But there's no length cap on the auto-generated slug beyond slugify's 80-char slice; consider asserting the final slug is non-empty + unique up-front rather than relying on the DB error path.

/app/server/routers/outreach.ts:122-136 — setStatus blindly updates with no existence check. If the slug doesn't exist, 0 rows update and we still return {ok:true}. For a triage tool that's probably fine, but consider returning the affected row count (or 404 on miss) so the UI can detect stale data.

/app/client/src/pages/HiContact.tsx:30-35 — useEffect ESLint disable for markViewed is fine, but the dep array only watches `slug`, not `contact`. Combined with the no-guard fire, this is the root cause of the spurious 400s on the unknown-slug path.

Filter-bar label drift: the spec says chips should be 'All/Warm/Lukewarm/Cold/Sales/Vendor/Skip' as separate chips; the implementation merges Sales+Vendor into one chip labelled 'Sales/Vendor (2)' (and the status enum only has 'sales', not 'vendor'). Counts still sum to 31 and the feature works, but if a true 'vendor' status is expected later, the zod enum + chip set + Postgres column will all need updates.
test_credentials: Auth bypassed in dev (createContext auto-injects seed-owner-001 as admin) per /app/memory/test_credentials.md. No external API keys needed.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created transient rows test-view-<ts>, test-warm-<ts>, test-default-<ts>, test-regress-<ts> and deleted them via outreach.remove at end of each test. No persistent test data left behind. The 31 production VIVID-event contacts were not modified beyond a brief warm→sales flip on matt-manly-spirits which was restored within the test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: pytest file /app/backend/tests/test_outreach_crm.py is self-contained, idempotent (cleans up after itself) and safe to re-run against the live preview. Frontend selectors used: [data-testid=status-filter-bar], [data-testid=status-select-<slug>], [data-testid=hi-greeting], [data-testid=hi-intro], [data-testid=hi-pain], [data-testid=hi-notfound], [data-testid=hi-page], [data-testid=hi-cta-primary], [data-testid=hi-cta-secondary]. The 'Sales/Vendor' chip is implemented as a single chip mapping to status='sales' (no 'vendor' enum value exists).
rca of the issue: N/A — all listed features behave as spec'd. The two 'minor' observations (nested <a> hydration on /admin; 400 from markViewed on unknown slugs) are cosmetic and one is pre-existing from iteration_11.
